old_post_content:
One of our customers first told us about this product, and now it’s a favorite among many! The Clean & Clear Exfoliating Oil-Free Face Wash is specially designed for those dealing with oily, acne-prone skin in Dhaka’s humid and polluted environment. With gentle exfoliating micro-beads, it deeply cleanses pores, removes excess oil, and leaves your skin feeling fresh without over-drying. The Emart team has personally verified its effectiveness, and it’s 100% authentic, USA-origin product.

Why choose this product?

If you struggle with oily skin or frequent breakouts, this face wash is a great pick. The micro-beads provide gentle exfoliation, sloughing away dead skin cells and unclogging pores without harsh scrubbing. It’s perfect for daily use, especially in Dhaka’s heat where sweat and pollution can make skin issues worse.

Unlike many exfoliating washes, this one is oil-free and non-comedogenic, meaning it won’t clog your pores or leave a greasy residue. It helps control shine throughout the day, making it ideal for those with combination or oily skin types. You’ll notice a smoother, clearer complexion with regular use.

Another big plus? It’s formulated to be gentle enough for everyday use while still being effective. Many exfoliators can be too harsh, but this one strikes the right balance—cleansing deeply without stripping your skin of essential moisture. If you’re tired of face washes that either don’t work or irritate your skin, this could be your new go-to.

Key Ingredients

The face wash contains naturally derived micro-beads that gently buff away impurities without causing micro-tears in the skin. These beads are biodegradable, making them a better choice for both your skin and the environment.

Salicylic acid is another key ingredient, known for its ability to penetrate pores and dissolve excess oil and dead skin cells. This makes it a powerful ally against acne and blackheads, especially in Dhaka’s humid climate where pores tend to get clogged easily.

Lastly, it includes glycerin, a hydrating agent that ensures your skin doesn’t feel tight or dry after washing. Even though it’s oil-free, it keeps your skin balanced—something crucial when dealing with heat and pollution daily.

How to use it

Start by wetting your face with lukewarm water. Take a small amount of the face wash and gently massage it onto your skin in circular motions, focusing on areas prone to oiliness or breakouts. The micro-beads will do their job exfoliating, so there’s no need to scrub hard. Rinse thoroughly and pat your face dry. For best results, use it twice daily—morning and night—followed by a light moisturizer to keep your skin hydrated.

If you’re new to exfoliating, start with once a day to see how your skin reacts. Over time, you can increase frequency if your skin tolerates it well. Always follow up with sunscreen during the day, especially in Dhaka’s strong sunlight.

Ready to give it a try? Order now and enjoy fast delivery—1-2 days in Dhaka, 3-5 days nationwide, with COD available. This 150ml bottle is a great value at ৳1200, and it’s a skincare essential you’ll want to repurchase. Trusted by the Emart team and loved by customers, it’s a reliable choice for clearer, fresher skin.
